contains-studio/agents ·GitHub ⭐ 12296 · Claude-Code, AI-Agents, Multi-Agent-System, Developer-Tools, Instructions

What it is

A structured library detailing explicit Claude Code sub-agent instructions configuring perfectly segmented virtual departments executing highly specialized development workflows identically.

Problems solved

  • Mitigates profoundly generic and unfocused LLM outputs systematically instantiating highly detailed character constraints simulating professional hierarchies maximizing efficiency radically executing complex software sprints reliably.

How to get started

Clone repositories copying explicitly .md specifications verifying .claude/agents/ directories loading custom prompts determining exact instructions effectively restarting Claude accurately.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

Contains Studio Agents operates precisely detailing a sophisticated orchestration blueprint designed rigorously maximizing Claude Code capabilities executing specialized functional protocols mimicking exactly agency-level product groups natively.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Requesting one virtual agent to evaluate legal compliance and immediately write CSS yields chaotic outcomes logically. Creating compartmentalized virtual experts structurally guarantees explicit context boundaries generating significantly superior technical derivations mimicking exactly human functional divisions optimally.

3. Technical Architecture

A purely structural parameter manifest utilizing precise Markdown formatting validating perfectly YAML metadata parameters injecting explicit role logic naturally natively configuring Claude sub-agent mechanics precisely.

4. Core Implementation

Isolates logic explicitly assigning tools parameters effectively describing precise execution limits simulating explicit constraints (e.g., "6-day sprints") driving deterministic formatting explicitly predicting behaviors dynamically initiating proactive triggers appropriately handling events correctly.

5. Code Organization

Categorized distinctly spanning exact operational groups formatting directories defining /design, /engineering, /marketing, mapping entirely specialized prompt variables maintaining unified structural paradigms successfully.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Inspect exactly the engineering/rapid-prototyper.md definitions utilizing structural contexts implementing precisely similar constraints adapting directly specific application logic formatting naturally identifying exact boundary parameters properly.

7. Summary

An elegantly simple incredibly powerful context framework fundamentally enhancing virtual coding processes systematically redefining how LLMs approach monolithic tasks splitting accurately workloads optimizing outputs drastically.
